proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(b, a / b)
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1(x2) - x1(x3)) / (x2 - x3) = difference_quotient(x1, x3, x2) }(f, x, x0)

goal: difference_quotient(f, x0, x) * increment = value_increment / increment * increment
difference_quotient(f, x0, x) * (x - x0) = difference_quotient(f, x0, x) * increment

proof: function(x1: lib(rat).Rat) { not x1.is_positive or lib(real.real_base).real_from_rat(x1).is_positive }(lib(rat).Rat.1)

goal: has_derivative_at(f, x0, d) = forall(x1: Real) { x1.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 != x0 and x2.is_close(x0, k0) implies difference_quotient(f, x0, x2).is_close(d, x1) } } }
proof: function(x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x5: Real) { x1 = x5 or not x5.is_close(x1, k0) or difference_quotient(x2, x1, x5).is_close(x3, x4) } } } = has_derivative_at(x2, x1, x3) }(x0, f, d)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { x1 != x0 and x1.is_close(x0, k0) implies difference_quotient(f, x0, x1).is_close(d, Real.1) } }
proof: (forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, k0) or difference_quotient(f, x0, x2).is_close(d, x1) } } } = true)

function(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0 != x0 and k0.is_close(x0, x2) and not difference_quotient(f, x0, k0).is_close(d, x1) } }) }(Real.1)
function(x1: Real, x2: Real) { not x1.is_positive or x2 < x2 + x1 }(Real.1, d.abs)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1 >= x2 = x2 <= x1 }[Real](d.abs, Real.0)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x1: T0, x2: T0) { (not x1 <= x2 and x2 <= x1) = x1 > x2 }[Real](bound, Real.0)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x1: T0, x2: T0) { (not x1 <= x2 and x2 <= x1) = x2 < x1 }[Real](d.abs + Real.1, Real.0)
function(x1: Real) { not x1 > Real.0 or x1.is_positive }(bound)
(forall(x1: Real) { x1 = x0 or not x1.is_close(x0, delta) or difference_quotient(f, x0, x1).is_close(d, Real.1) } = true)
function(x1: Real) { not (x1 != x0 and x1.is_close(x0, delta) and not difference_quotient(f, x0, x1).is_close(d, Real.1)) }(x)

goal: exists(k0: Real, k1: Real) { k0.is_positive and k1.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { x1 != x0 and x1.is_close(x0, k0) implies difference_quotient(f, x0, x1).abs <= k1 } }
proof: delta.is_positive
function(x1: Real) { not exists(k0: Real) { x1.is_positive and k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, x1) or difference_quotient(f, x0, x2).abs <= k0 } } }(delta)
function(x1: Real, x2: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and x2.is_positive and forall(x3: Real) { x3 = x0 or not x3.is_close(x0, x1) or difference_quotient(f, x0, x3).abs <= x2 }) }(delta, bound)
function(x1: Real, x2: Real) { not forall(x3: Real) { x3 = x0 or not x3.is_close(x0, x1) or difference_quotient(f, x0, x3).abs <= x2 } or not (x1.is_positive and x2.is_positive) }(delta, bound)
function(x1: Real, x2: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and x2.is_positive) or exists(k0: Real) { k0 != x0 and k0.is_close(x0, x1) and not difference_quotient(f, x0, k0).abs <= x2 } }(delta, bound)
function(x1: Real, x2: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0 != x0 and k0.is_close(x0, x1) and not difference_quotient(f, x0, k0).abs <= x2 } }(delta, bound)
function(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0 != x0 and k0.is_close(x0, x1) and not difference_quotient(f, x0, k0).abs <= bound } }(delta)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0 != x0 and w0.is_close(x0, delta) and not difference_quotient(f, x0, w0).abs <= bound }
function(x1: Real) { not x1.is_close(x0, delta) or difference_quotient(f, x0, x1).abs <= bound or x0 = x1 }(w0)

goal: difference_quotient(f, x0, x) * (x - x0) = f(x) - f(x0)
difference_quotient(f, x0, x).abs * (x - x0).abs = (difference_quotient(f, x0, x) * (x - x0)).abs

proof: function(x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1 - x2).abs < x3 = x1.is_close(x2, x3) }(x, x0, delta)

goal: difference_quotient(f, x0, x).abs * (x - x0).abs <= bound * (x - x0).abs
difference_quotient(f, x0, x).abs * (x - x0).abs < bound * delta

proof: function(x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1 - x2).abs < x3 = x1.is_close(x2, x3) }(f(x), f(x0), eps)

goal: exists(k0: Real, k1: Real) { k0.is_positive and k1.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { x1 != x0 and x1.is_close(x0, k0) implies difference_quotient(f, x0, x1).abs <= k1 } }
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and k0 * bound < eps }
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and k0 < dq_delta and k0 < small_delta }

proof: (forall(x1: Real) { x1 = x0 or not x1.is_close(x0, dq_delta) or difference_quotient(f, x0, x1).abs <= bound } = true)
function(x1: Real) { not (x1 != x0 and x1.is_close(x0, dq_delta) and not difference_quotient(f, x0, x1).abs <= bound) }(x)
function(x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1 - x2).abs < x3 = x1.is_close(x2, x3) }(x, x0, small_delta)
function(x1: Real, x2: Real) { x1 * x2 = x2 * x1 }(small_delta, bound)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x1 < x2 or not x2 < x3 or x1 < x3 }[Real](bound * delta, small_delta * bound, eps)
function(x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real -> Real, x4: Real) { forall(x5: Real) { not x5.is_close(x1, x2) or x3(x5).is_close(x3(x1), x4) } = continuous_condition(x3, x1, x2, x4) }(x0, delta, f, eps)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_close(x0, delta) and not f(w0).is_close(f(x0), eps) }
function(x1: Real) { not x1.is_close(x0, delta) or f(x1).is_close(f(x0), eps) }(w0)

goal: delta.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, delta, eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, k0, eps) }
proof: function(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, eps)) }(delta)

goal: continuous_at(f, x0) = forall(x1: Real) { x1.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, k0, x1) } }
proof: function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { forall(x3: Real) { not x3.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(x1, x2, k0, x3) } } = continuous_at(x1, x2) }(f, x0)

goal: not forall(x1: Real) { x1.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, k0, x1) } }
proof: let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, w0) } }
function(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, k0, x1) } }(w0)
w0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x0, x2, w0) }
let w1: Real satisfy { w1.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, w1, w0) }
function(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, w0)) }(w1)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, k0)) } }
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, k0, bad_eps) }
proof: function(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, k0, x1) } }(bad_eps)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, w0, bad_eps) }
(forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or not continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, bad_eps) } = true)
function(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x0, x1, bad_eps)) }(w0)
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(f, x0)
